name: Marci
description: Whistle Link Marci Marci bounds to the targeted unit, choosing a direction and distance she will spring away from it. Grants the targeted ally a short duration movement speed bonus.

abilities.name: Special Delivery
abilities.description: Marci whistles and instantly teleports her to her.

abilities.name: Dispose
abilities.description: Grabs the unit-targeted ally or enemy unit and throws it effortlessly behind her, damaging and slowing the unit if it's an enemy. Additionally damages and applies a movement speed slow to all enemy units within the landing radius.

abilities.name: Rebound
abilities.description: Adds enemy targeting functionality, and Marci applies the movement speed boost on herself upon cast. Increases damage. Cannot cast ability while being affected by sources. However, the Root source application does not nullify the ability once it is cast.

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.description: Grants the unit-targeted ally a damage barrier, and a portion of Marci's lifesteal and attack damage bonuses. The barrier depletes either upon Marci or upon the unit-targeted ally receiving damage. Although the barrier depletes either upon Marci or upon the unit-targeted ally receiving damage, the barrier value restores corresponding to Marci's attack damage dealt on enemy heroes.

abilities.name: Unleash
abilities.description: The last strike in every flurry combo unleashes a damaging pulse around the target, and slows the target's movement speed and its base attack speed.
